originalAlarm.description: Assigned value is garbage or undefined

sanitizedDescription: Assigned value is garbage or undefined
reasoning: At 30e053248da.c L31, `int x = *length` reads length which is uninitialized when !CONFIG_SECURITY (security_old_inode_init_security does not write *len in that path). This is the VBDB-known bug marked // (6) ERROR. PC = true includes CONFIG_SECURITY=T where *length IS initialized (nondet always returns 42, so *len=0 is always set). PC is too broad — under-constrained.
